heading: Recognition of gain for tax purposes
label: 57307 Recognition of gain for tax purposes
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5730746 App.:1160(e)., title V, § 510(e), as added , ; , , .June 29, 1936, ch. 858Aug. 4, 1939, ch. 417, § 753 Stat. 1184Pub. L. 97–31, § 12(91)95 Stat. 161Aug. 6, 1981The words “for gain or loss upon a sale or exchange and for depreciation under the applicable Federal income-tax laws” and “or vessels exchanged for credit upon the acquisition of such new vessel” are omitted as unnecessary. In paragraph (1), the words “the difference between the cost of the new vessel and the trade-in allowance of the obsolete vessel” are substituted for “the amount of the cost of such vessel (other than the cost represented by such obsolete vessel or vessels)” for clarity.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5730746 App.:1160(e)., title V, § 510(e), as added , ; , , .June 29, 1936, ch. 858Aug. 4, 1939, ch. 417, § 753 Stat. 1184Pub. L. 97–31, § 12(91)95 Stat. 161Aug. 6, 1981The words “for gain or loss upon a sale or exchange and for depreciation under the applicable Federal income-tax laws” and “or vessels exchanged for credit upon the acquisition of such new vessel” are omitted as unnecessary. In paragraph (1), the words “the difference between the cost of the new vessel and the trade-in allowance of the obsolete vessel” are substituted for “the amount of the cost of such vessel (other than the cost represented by such obsolete vessel or vessels)” for clarity.

children.text: increased by the difference between the cost of the new vessel and the trade-in allowance of the obsolete vessel; and
decreased by the amount of loss recognized on the transfer.
